name: Acorn Capital Investment Fund Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.9290. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.9256 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.9290, stop A$0.8910, target A$0.9350. Risk/reward is 0.16:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
